title: FPP pluginInfo.json
description: Metadata file each FPP plugin ships at its repo root. Referenced by pluginList.json.

repoName.description: Unique key; must match the plugin's GitHub repo name and its pluginList.json entry name.

name.description: Human-friendly display name shown in the Plugin Manager.

srcURL.description: The URL FPP clones from at install time (this is the trust anchor for the Official badge). Must be a github.com repo — that's the only source FPP plugins support.

bugURL.description: Where users report bugs (usually the repo's /issues page).

allowUpdates.description: 1/true if the Plugin Manager may offer updates.

private.description: Set truthy if the repo is private (skips the public-repo check).

versions.description: One entry per supported FPP version range. Must be non-empty.

minFPPVersion.description: Lowest FPP version this entry supports, e.g. "10.0".

maxFPPVersion.description: Highest supported FPP version, or "0" for open-ended.

branch.description: Git branch to install for this version range.

sha.description: Optional pinned commit SHA for provenance (recommended). Empty string = track branch tip.

dependencies.description: Optional. Deps FPP resolves before running the plugin's own fpp_install.sh.

plugins.description: Other plugin repoNames this plugin depends on.
